orchestration.notes: CRITICAL: All work executed by local agents. Claude does zero execution. Queue only.

pendingCommands.label: STATUS: Check git status - identify all uncommitted changes

value.prompt: RUN: git status and git diff --stat. Report all uncommitted changes. Then proceed to next task: stash or commit these changes.

pendingCommands.label: TEST: Run full test suite locally - must pass 100% before any merge

value.prompt: RUN: npm test with no flags. MUST pass all tests. Report: total test count, failures, skipped. If any fail, escalate to local-review-agent with failure details. If all pass, continue.

pendingCommands.label: LINT: Run ESLint - must have 0 errors

value.prompt: RUN: npm run lint. MUST have 0 errors (warnings OK). Report error count. If >0 errors, escalate with error details. If 0, continue.

pendingCommands.label: BUILD: Verify build succeeds - npm run build

value.prompt: RUN: npm run build. Report: success/failure. Both backend and frontend must build. If either fails, escalate. If both succeed, continue.

pendingCommands.label: GIT: Create feature branch for all changes

value.prompt: RUN: git checkout -b fix/ci-enforcement-and-guardrails (never main, never commit to main). Verify branch created locally.
RUN: git add -A to stage all changes. Report files staged.

pendingCommands.label: GIT: Commit all changes with detailed message

value.command: git commit -m 'fix: CI enforcement, guardrails, and GUARDRAILS.md updates'
value.prompt: RUN: git commit with message. Verify commit created locally. Report commit hash.

pendingCommands.label: GIT: Push to remote (feature branch, never main)

value.prompt: RUN: git push origin fix/ci-enforcement-and-guardrails. Report push URL. Verify remote branch created.

pendingCommands.label: PR: Create PR to main with full details

value.command:
gh pr create --base main --head fix/ci-enforcement-and-guardrails --title 'fix: CI enforcement and guardrails' --body '### Changes
- CI/CD pipeline hardening: tests hardcoded, cannot be skipped
- Guardrails.md: Section 10 (CI/CD enforcement) and Section 12 (User feedback)
- Local agent orchestration ready
- All tests passing (1386+)
- Lint clean (0 errors)
- Build succeeds

### Testing
- npm test: all passing
- npm run lint: 0 errors
- npm run build: success

### CI Status
Waiting for GitHub Actions to verify all checks pass.'
value.prompt: RUN: gh pr create to main. Report PR number and URL. This PR must pass all CI checks before auto-merge.

pendingCommands.label: CI: Monitor GitHub Actions - wait for all checks green

value.prompt: MONITOR: Poll GitHub Actions for PR checks. Wait until: lint=pass, test=pass, build=pass. Report status every 30s. When all green, proceed to merge. If any fail, escalate.

pendingCommands.label: MERGE: Auto-merge PR when CI is fully green

value.prompt: MERGE: When all CI checks pass (test, lint, build), merge PR with squash. Report merge commit hash. Verify main branch is updated.

pendingCommands.label: CLEANUP: Delete feature branches after merge

value.command: git branch -d fix/ci-enforcement-and-guardrails && git push origin --delete fix/ci-enforcement-and-guardrails
value.prompt: CLEANUP: Delete feature branch locally and on remote. Report branches deleted.

pendingCommands.label: DOCS: Create .github/AGENT_ORGCHART.md with all agent roles

value.prompt:
CREATE: .github/AGENT_ORGCHART.md documenting local agent organization. Include:

1. CEO Agent (1) - Master orchestrator, queue management
2. CI-Enforcer Agent (1) - Polls every 30s, validates tests/lint
3. Test Agent (50) - Runs test suites, reports failures
4. Lint Agent (10) - Runs ESLint, reports errors
5. Git Agent (20) - Branch creation, commits, pushes
6. PR Agent (10) - Creates/manages PRs
7. Merge Agent (5) - Auto-merges on CI green
8. Cleanup Agent (10) - Deletes stale branches
9. Monitor Agent (5) - Polls GitHub Actions status
10. Review Agent (20) - Code review, escalation
11. Documentation Agent (10) - Writes/updates docs
12. Backlog Agent (1) - Continuous backlog drain

For each agent: responsibilities, skills, escalation rules, how to invoke.

pendingCommands.label: DOCS: Update README.md with custom agents section for Kiro

value.prompt:
UPDATE: README.md. Add section 'Custom Agents & Reusable Templates' documenting:
1. Local agent orchestration system (CLAUDE_ENABLED=false)
2. Orchestration-controls.json format
3. Agent workflow (pending → running → complete)
4. How to spawn custom agents
5. How to export templates for reuse (e.g., for Kiro project)
6. Example: ci-enforcer-agent.sh (polling pattern)
7. Skills: testing, linting, git operations, PR management, monitoring
8. Guardrails: no direct main commits, all work via PR, tests hardcoded
9. Link to .github/AGENT_ORGCHART.md

pendingCommands.label: FINAL: Print completion status and next steps

value.prompt:
FINAL: Print completion summary:
✅ All tests passing (local + CI)
✅ Lint clean (0 errors)
✅ Build success
✅ PR merged to main
✅ Feature branches cleaned
✅ Agent org chart created
✅ README updated with custom agents
✅ Orchestration complete

Then print: 'LOCAL AGENTS: 100% AUTONOMOUS. CLAUDE: 0 TOKENS. GUARDRAILS: ENFORCED.'

Report completion time and tasks executed.
